heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 152708 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15270836:1514 (1st sentence)., (1st sentence), .Dec. 2, 1980Pub. L. 96–489, § 1594 Stat. 2555
